ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Franceschini appeared by zoom for Reford Whitman (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there is a question of whether to require bond, limited authority or no bond. Mr. Franceschini stated that the will waives bond, that the property in question is in a probate for the Deceased in Alameda County, that the Professional Fiduciary is the Administrator in that estate and that there is a bond in that case. Mr. Franceschini also stated that the Daughter's Boyfriend owns 20% of the property and is not cooperating with them to get it sold, and that the net value of the property is $600,000.00. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $600,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for February 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
